# Copilot pull request description instructions

When generating or filling in a PR description for this repository, follow the sections in `.github/pull_request_template.md` exactly. Rules below map each section to the diff.

---

## PR title

Derive from the commit message style in `.github/rules/.copilot-commit-message-instructions.md`:

```
<type>(<scope>): <imperative summary>.
```

Examples:
```
feat(web): Add CheckoutPage page object and positive login spec.
fix(api): Correct status assertion in user CRUD DELETE test.
docs(github): Refactor copilot-instructions for Playwright + TypeScript project.
```

If the branch name contains a Jira key (e.g. `tc-123-add-checkout-page`), append it: `feat(web): Add CheckoutPage page object. TC-123]`

---

## Section-by-section instructions

### 1пёЏвѓЈ Pre-submit checklist

Tick (`[x]`) only items that are confirmed true for this diff. Leave the rest unchecked for the author.

| Checklist item | Tick when |
|----------------|-----------|
| No secrets / credentials in committed files | Diff contains no `.env` values, tokens, passwords, or `storageState` exports |
| Web specs import from `fixtures/webTest.ts` | Any `tests/web/` file was changed |
| API specs import from `fixtures/apiTest.ts` | Any `tests/api/` file was changed |
| UI logic in page objects; HTTP in clients | `pages/` and `clients/` changes are separate from specs |
| `npm run lint` passes | Lint was run and clean |
| `gitleaks detect --source .` passes | No secrets detected (Husky runs this automatically) |
| `npm run test:web` passes | Web files were changed |
| `npm run test:api` passes | API files were changed |
| `npm run test:verify` run before merge | Full suite run when scope is wide or uncertain |
| Test commands and results in section 6пёЏвѓЈ | Test evidence block is populated |
| **Completed checklist above** | All relevant items above are ticked |

### 2пёЏвѓЈ Describe your change(s)

- **Summary:** 1вЂ“3 sentences вЂ” what changed and why
- **Motivation and context:** the ticket, bug, or improvement that drives this PR
- **Dependencies:** other open PRs, required env vars, or `N/A`

### 3пёЏвѓЈ Related work

Extract from the branch name or commit body. Format:

```
[TC-123](https://your-workspace.atlassian.net/browse/TC-123)
```

If no ticket exists, write `N/A`. Do not use `TC-XXXX` or `your-workspace.atlassian.net`.

### 4пёЏвѓЈ Type of change

Tick every emoji checkbox that applies based on the diff; leave the rest unticked.

| Checkbox | Tick when |
|----------|-----------|
| рџ§Є Test coverage | New or updated `tests/web/` or `tests/api/` specs |
| рџЏ—пёЏ Framework / helpers | Changes to `pages/`, `clients/`, `fixtures/`, `hooks/`, `utils/` |
| рџ“„ Test data | Changes to `data/web/*.json` or `data/api/*.json` |
| вљ™пёЏ Configuration | Changes to `playwright.config.ts`, `.env.example`, ESLint, `tsconfig.json` |
| рџ“љ Documentation | Changes to `README.md` or `.github/` AI assets |
| рџђ› Bug fix | Corrects a broken test, locator, assertion, or hook |
| в™»пёЏ Refactor | Restructures code without changing behaviour |
| рџ“Ћ Other | Anything not covered above |

### 5пёЏвѓЈ Areas touched

Tick based on directories changed:

| Checkbox | Files changed |
|----------|--------------|
| рџЊђ Web UI | `tests/web/`, `pages/` |
| рџ”Њ API | `tests/api/`, `clients/` |
| рџ”§ Shared | `fixtures/`, `hooks/`, `utils/`, `playwright.config.ts` |
| рџ“ќ Docs / tooling only | `README.md`, `.github/`, config files with no test change |

### 6пёЏвѓЈ Test evidence

Populate the code block with the exact commands to run for this diff вЂ” do not invent or fabricate passing results. Leave the block for the author to fill in if results are not yet available.

| Files changed | Suggested command |
|---------------|-------------------|
| `tests/web/`, `pages/` | `npm run test:web` or `npx playwright test tests/web/<file>` |
| `tests/api/`, `clients/` | `npm run test:api` or `npx playwright test tests/api/<file>` |
| Mixed / uncertain | `npm run test:verify` |
| Docs / tooling only | `npm run lint` |

### 7пёЏвѓЈ Screenshots / reports (optional)

Mention Playwright HTML report path (`playwright-report/`) or Allure path (`allure-report/`) if relevant to the reviewer. Do not attach screenshots that contain real credentials or session data.

### 8пёЏвѓЈ Notes for reviewers

Include: breaking changes, known flaky areas, follow-up tickets, or environment variables the reviewer needs to run the tests locally.

---

## General rules

- Never reference Azure DevOps, ADO pipelines, or `quilter.atlassian.net`
- Do not mark the PR as draft or suggest ADO-specific steps
- Do not invent test results вЂ” populate commands; leave results for the author
- Do not weaken or omit the secrets checklist item
- Use the emoji section numbers from the template (`1пёЏвѓЈ`вЂ“`8пёЏвѓЈ`) вЂ” do not renumber
